info.title: Git.Conventional.Cli
info.description: dotnet-git-conventional can generate changelog files from the Git history by utilizing conventional commits and semantic versioning in combination with a wide flexibility by providing a broad set of configuration possiblities.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generates changelog files from the Git history by utilizing conventional commits and semantic versioning in combination with a wide flexibility by providing a broad set of configuration possibilities.

commands.name: changelog
commands.description: Generates a changelog based on the commits.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Saves the default configuration file to the current repository root.

commands.name: schema
commands.description: Generates the configuration json schema file to import into your editor.

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validates the commit message in the given file. Please put the command 'gc validate --msg-file $1' into the commit-msg hook.
